description.value: You understand your affliction enough to wield your inability to communicate certain things as a shield against prying eyes, adorning yourself with imagery of pre-Gap truths that are obscured to most people. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Invisibility] as a 2nd-rank occult innate spell three times per day, but the spell's duration becomes "until the end of your next turn."
